pr-pilot.githubBaseUrl.description: GitHub base URL. Change for GitHub Enterprise (e.g. https://github.mycompany.com).

pr-pilot.notificationsEnabled.description: Poll GitHub in the background and notify when new matching pull requests appear. The first poll seeds existing PRs silently.

pr-pilot.notifyReviewRequested.description: When notifications are enabled, notify for new open pull requests requesting your review.

pr-pilot.notifyStarredRepos.description: When notifications are enabled, also notify for new open pull requests on your starred repositories.

pr-pilot.notificationPollMinutes.description: Background pull request notification polling interval in minutes.

pr-pilot.reviewModel.description: Model ID for the Claude CLI. Empty uses the CLI default.

pr-pilot.reviewModelCopilot.description: Model ID for the GitHub Copilot CLI. Default `claude-sonnet-4.6` balances JSON schema adherence and code-review depth without Opus-tier latency. Empty uses the CLI's default routing. Run the `PR Pilot: Select Copilot Review Model` command (or the gear in the PR Pilot view title) to pick from models discovered via the Copilot SDK — the field is freeform because the catalog changes over time.

pr-pilot.reviewProvider.description: Backend CLI used to generate reviews and chat replies.

pr-pilot.reviewEffort.description: Reasoning effort passed to `copilot --reasoning-effort`. Higher = deeper review, slower. Only applied when `pr-pilot.reviewProvider` is `copilot`. Default `medium` balances catching real issues against latency.

pr-pilot.copilotInheritMcp.description: When enabled, the Copilot review/chat session inherits MCP servers from the Copilot CLI config (`~/.copilot/mcp-config.json`) and any repo-local `.mcp.json`, giving the reviewer the same tools as the `copilot` CLI. Only applied when `pr-pilot.reviewProvider` is `copilot`.

pr-pilot.copilotConfigDir.description: Optional override of the Copilot config directory used to discover MCP servers. Empty uses the CLI default (`~/.copilot`). Only applied when `pr-pilot.reviewProvider` is `copilot`.

pr-pilot.reviewFocusAreas.description: Default focus areas the reviewer should prioritize (e.g. `security, performance, test coverage`). Sent to the model as steering context. A per-review override in the PR Pilot view takes precedence when set.

pr-pilot.reviewCustomInstructions.description: Default extra instructions appended to every review prompt (e.g. team conventions to enforce). A per-review override in the PR Pilot view takes precedence when set.

scripts.test:unit: sh -c 'npm run build:test && node --test dist-test/test/*.test.js; rc=$?; rm -rf dist-test; exit $rc'
